Comment.MultiLanguageText: Part Control Enable - Param or Condition

Undrilled Pos. Setpoint (Option Individual Ctrl) - Param
Drilled Pos. Reached (Option Individual Ctrl) - Param
Drilled Pos. Setpoint (Option Individual Ctrl) - Param

Part Measure Value (Option Analog Measure) - From AI

LineComment.Text: Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Reset start when axis in position
